name: HyperFrames Video Composer
description: Upstream HyperFrames reference for standalone HyperFrames projects and detailed HTML/CSS/GSAP composition guidance. Inside Prometheus Creative Video mode, read prometheus-hyperframes-bridge first and use this skill as a selective reference.

resources.description: House rules for HyperFrames layout, motion, and composition taste.
Named visual style presets for video identity decisions.
Guidance for animating charts, stats, and data-driven scenes.
Motion timing, easing, pacing, and animation taste rules.
CSS patterns for polished HyperFrames compositions.
Transition catalog for scene changes and visual energy.
